---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new widget, NL pattern, or UI capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What gap you're hitting**
<!-- What does the UI NOT let you do today that you'd like to do? -->

**Type**
- [ ] New widget for an existing tool
- [ ] NL pattern for a tool currently only reachable via Tools view
- [ ] New row action on an existing widget
- [ ] New cross-cutting UI feature (palette / toasts / etc.)
- [ ] Other:

**If a new widget — screenshot or sketch welcome**

**Willing to contribute?**
- [ ] Yes, I'll send a PR (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I'd like help scoping this first
